text.tspan: Large images can be displayed at full content width for maximum impact:
Complete system overview diagram showing all major components and their relationships.
, the system architecture consists of four primary modules working in concert.
Images can be positioned on the left side with text flowing alongside:
Individual module icon representing the parsing engine.
This layout demonstrates how content wraps around left
aligned images. The parsing module serves as
the foundation of the conversion pipeline, responsible for transforming raw Markdown syntax into an
abstract syntax tree (AST) that the builder can process.
The default presentation centers images within the content area:
